title: High molecular weight DNA extraction from algae : SoCK (Sorbitol + CTAB + KAc)
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"7lss0","text":"High Molecular Weight DNA extraction protocol from algae for Long Read sequencing.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"frimm","text":"Extraction is performed from flash frozen algal fragments stored at -80° C.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"b2r23","text":"The protocol is adapted for an extraction of 1 g of algal fragment.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"6feag","text":"The protocol is based on washing the algae with Sorbitol, followed by a conventional extraction with CTAB and then a purification with Potassium acetate coupled with chloroform. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"a0iuc","text":"This protocol is specifically adapted to all types of algae (green, red or brown).","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"5asug","text":"Use only wide bore tips.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"ahb","text":"Work in a chemical hood when using 2-mercaptoethanol.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"5637d","text":"Allow the DNA to resuspend for at least of 24 hours before proceeding with QC.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"1chk0","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}

steps: Sorbitol pre-wash buffer : the buffer can be stored for 6 months at 4°C Reagents Final Concentration 1 Tris HCl ph8 100 mM 2 EDTA 5 mM 3 Sorbitol 700 mM 4 PVP 40 1% 5 H2O Qsp 100 ml
Lysis Buffer Reagents Final Concentration 1 Tris HCl ph8 100 mM 2 EDTA 20 mM 3 CTAB 2 % 4 NaCl 1.4 M 5 PEG 8000 1 % 6 H2O Qsp 20 ml
Put a mortar in ice. Cool the mortar and pestle with liquid nitrogen until the bubbling stops. Liquid Nitrogen Contributed by users
Grind 1g of frozen sample to a fine powder (approx. 2 min), without adding liquid nitrogen. 1 g 00:02:00
Add 20 ml of Sorbitol pre-wash Buffer in a 50 ml tube. 20 mL, Sorbitol buffer
Transfer powder to sorbitol pre-wash buffer
Add 20 µl of 2-Mercaptoethanol and vortex 5 s 2-mercaptoethanol Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #M6250
Centrifuge 5 minutes with low deceleration 5000 x g, Room temperature, 5 minutes, Acc 9 / Dec 7
Carrefully remove the supernatan t without resuspending the pellet.
Perform a second sorbitol wash as above (step 3 + 7 + 8 +9)
Resuspend the pellet with 20 ml of Lysis buffer .
Add 50 µl of 2-Mercaptoethanol and 40 µl of RNaseA (100mg/ml) and vortex 5 s 2-mercaptoethanol Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #M6250 RNaseA Thermo Fisher Catalog #12091021
Incubate 1h at 65°C with low agitation (300 rpm) 01:00:00 65 °C
Centrifuge 10 minutes with low deceleration 8500 x g, 4 °C, 10 minutes, Acc 9 / Dec 7
Gently transfer the supernatant to a new 50 ml tube.

Add : - 0.1 vol of absolute ethanol Ethanol absolute Contributed by users (CAS: 64-17-5) - 0.25 vol of KAc 3M Potassium Acetate Contributed by users - 1 vol of chloroform isoamyl alcohol Chloroform Isoamyl alcohol 24:1 Merck
Vortex 5 sec and incubate 20 min at -20°C 00:20:00 -20 °C
Centrifuge 20 minutes with low deceleration 8500 x g, 4 °C, 20 minutes, Acc 9 / Dec 7
Gently transfer the aqueous phase to a new 50 ml tube.

Add : - 0.8 vol of isopropano l 2-Propanol (IsoPropanol) Bio Basic Inc. Catalog #PC8601.SIZE.4L - 0.1 vol of NaAc 3M Sodium acetate P212121 - 0.2% of 2-Mercaptoethanol 2-mercaptoethanol Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #M6250
mix gently by inversion 10 times and incubate 1h at -20°C 01:00:00 -20 °C
Centrifuge 20 minutes with low deceleration 8500 x g, 4 °C, 20 minutes, Acc 9 / Dec 7
Carefully discard the supernatant, gently resuspend the pellet with 1 ml of cold 70% ethanol. 70% Ethanol Contributed by users
Transfer the resuspended DNA to a 1.5 ml DNA LoBind tube.
Centrifuge 10 minutes with low deceleration 5000 x g, 4 °C, 10 minutes, Acc 9 / Dec 7
Carefully discard the supernatant. Air dry the pelle t at RT for about 10 minutes. 00:10:00
Resuspend the pellet with 50-100 µl of 1X TE buffer. 1X TE buffer (10 mM Tris-HCl pH 8.0 1 mM EDTA) Contributed by users
Allow the DNA to resuspend for 2 hours at 55°C or ON at RT. 02:00:00 55 °C
Store the DNA at 4°C.

Quantify your sample with a Qubit DNA HS assay. Check the purity of the sample with a Nanodrop (measurements of 260/280 and 260/230 absorbance ratios). Estimate the molecular weight of the sample with a Tapestation and/or a Femto pulse
Depending on the DNA concentrations and DNA length profiles, deplete short DNA molecules using SRE size selection kits (SRE XS, SRE or SRE XL kits).
QC results obtained on different species. (3 green algae and 3 red algae)
creator: Benoît Vacherie
